text:
Note that for 2016–2018 this is the date of the 
last CMR review during the year, if more than one CMR was provided. 

TYPE: DATE 

LENGTH: 9 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: CMS created the MTM file from information submitted by Part D plan sponsors to CMS’s Health Plan 
Management System (HPMS). 

This field is only populated if the variable CMR_RECEIVED_NUM is greater than 1. For 2013–2015, 
there are fields for five CMR dates, see variables (CMR_RECEIVED_DT1–CMR_RECEIVED_DT5
